title: Mage - Fractured Script
description: Explore the Mysteries of The Broken Script and other horror mods!
body:
# Singleplayer is not singleplayer anymore...
The Fractured Script is a modpack adding many horror mods for Minecraft, mainly focused around **The Broken Script** mod, but having other mods as well for a scarier experience.
## Features
- Voice chat, don't speak!
- Sound physics, works great with voice chat!
- The Knocker, watch your windows!
- The Man from the Fog, don't be eaten!
- From the Fog, experience the legend of Herobrine in game!
- Tree harvesting, don't waste time chopping trees.
- Sanity system, crazy or not!
- QOL features like backported wolves, briding mod, & more!
- Lightweight, around 40 mods to keep it scary, but simple!
- Optimized for a great experience!

![Um](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28a07b4d6606877121555c7c4fd4c7464db94553.png)


![Who is that?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1675a26906abd85b16f85504d16db09ca1250c75.png)




![No way out](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ccddfc40843a8b78142d562ed09a8bd1fd5ccaf_0.webp)

### Permissions
You can use this pack in videos & playing for yourself of course!

You can **NOT** distribute this pack and claim it as your own, or make money from distributing it.


Made with love from Archmage & Zel
